# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

parameters: 
 - name: storageAccountNamePrefix
   type: string    # Required parameter, no input from user or default value    
 - name: location
   type: string      # Optional Parameter with predefined values. No Default Value provided here        
resources:       # Define the resources to be created by this template
  - apiVersion: "2019-06-01"    // Specify API Version for ARM Template    
   kind:          # Required Kind, no input from user or default value. For example 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts'        
      type:       "#Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"  // Custom Resource Definition Type       
    name:          ~ parameters('storageAccountNamePrefix')   /// Use the parameter as Name for this resource    
 properties:          # Required Properties, no input from user or default value here        
      location : ~parameters ('location', 'West US' )  // Provide Predefined values. If not provided will use Default Values in Azure (if any) by ARM template      
    sku:             /// Use the parameter as Sku for this resource     # Required, no input from user or default value here        
      name : 'Standard_LRS'  // Provide Predefined values. If not provided will use Default Values in Azure (if any) by ARM template      
    kind:            /// Use the parameter as Kind for this resource     # Required, no input from user or default value here        
      type : 'blob'  // Provide Predefined values. If not provided will use Default Values in Azure (if any) by ARM template      
    properties:          /// Use the parameter as Properties for this resource     # Required, no input from user or default value here        
      accessTier : 'Standard'  // Provide Predefined values. If not provided will use Default Values in Azure (if any) by ARM template      
    tags:            /// Use the parameter as Tags for this resource     # Required, no input from user or default value here        
      {% if parameters('tags') is defined %}  // Check whether there's a 'parameters.tagNamePrefix', and use it when provided           {'key1': 'value1'}   }}}}}}// End of required properties      `}    }}     ---> A template will not be able to handle this, as the tags parameter isn’t defined in Azure Blob Storage resource definition
